visual_description: An older man with gray hair in a gray suit sits at a table laden with white dishes and a drink with a straw, using chopsticks to eat while a person stands behind him with arms crossed. The view shifts to a close-up of the same man as he speaks, his mouth open and expression animated. A second man with dark hair wearing a white shirt with a blue stripe appears, looking off to the side.
audio_description: The audio includes the man speaking and chewing sounds, with ambient background noise.
